title: marsdenia reichenbachii
intro: Marsdenia reichenbachii, also known as the Thai Milk Vine, is a perennial climber native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Myanmar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits of Marsdenia reichenbachii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and hypertension, as well as its potential to treat gastrointestinal issues and other health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
